beatFlagged.headline: Iran's regime is still intact - the coming days will show if it can hold out
beatFlagged.description: Iran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue.

beatFlagged.headline: Allies of US in the Gulf bear brunt of Iran attacks
beatFlagged.description: Iran's attacks on Gulf Arab states suggest the Islamic Republic is targeting not just the US military but also civilian infrastructure.

beatFlagged.headline: Nine dead in missile attack on Israel as Iran strikes region
beatFlagged.description: Several deaths are reported across the Middle East as Tehran retaliates for massive strikes by the US and Israel.

beatFlagged.headline: Months of planning behind US-Israeli mission to target Iran's supreme leader
beatFlagged.description: A piece of crucial intelligence arrived just hours before the attack on a compound in central Tehran.

beatFlagged.headline: At least 153 dead after reported strike on school, Iran says
beatFlagged.description: Iran has blamed the US and Israel for the strike; the US is looking into reports of the incident, while the IDF says it is "not aware" of operations in the area.

beatFlagged.headline: What we know so far about the US-Israel attacks and Iran's retaliation
beatFlagged.description: Iran responds by launching missiles and drones towards Israel and four Gulf Arab countries that host US military bases.

beatFlagged.headline: Lyse Doucet: This is an extraordinary moment Iran has been preparing for
beatFlagged.description: The killing of the supreme leader will be a huge jolt to the Islamic Republic, which will try hard to show it has a plan in place.

beatFlagged.headline: Bowen: A dangerous moment, but US and Israel see opportunity not to be missed
beatFlagged.description: Israel and the US believe Iran's regime is vulnerable, dealing with an economic crisis and the aftermath of protests.

beatFlagged.headline: Inside Iran, panic as strikes hit but for some it's a moment of relief
beatFlagged.description: Iranians talk about what is happening inside the country, despite an almost total internet blackout.

beatFlagged.headline: Ayatollah Khamenei's iron grip on power in Iran comes to an end
beatFlagged.description: Iranian state TV confirms the supreme leader has been killed on the first day of massive US and Israeli air strikes on the country.

beatFlagged.headline: 'People are getting poorer': How Iran's struggling economy is changing how families live
beatFlagged.description: The soaring cost of living has left people struggling to afford basic items - creating pressures which led to mass protests.
